fields.summary: [UI2] Maintain constant horizontal application info bar for Application Attempt page

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description:
Steps:
1) enable Ats v2
2) Start Yarn service application ( Httpd )
3) Fix horizontal info bar for below pages.
 * component page
 * Component Instance info page 
 * Application attempt Info

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body:
Hi Yesha,

Attach a screen shot if easily possible so that it's clearer what the error is.
[~yeshavora] Could you please attach a screenshot?

1. Added horizontal navigation bar for component page
2. Removed old left nav panel from attempt-info and component-instance pages.



cc [~sunilg]

Latest patch looks fine to me. Committing shortly.
